title: Reference Data
description: Issuance and reference information about an asset, including issuer details and offering metadata

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the reference data was created

issuerName.description: Legal name of the asset issuer

offeringPageUrl.description: URL to the offering page for the asset

issuancePlatform.description: Platform used for issuance (e.g. Securitize, Tokeny)

issuanceJurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction where the asset was issued
